leads.lead_title: Retender for RO water filter AMC
leads.why_interesting: Retender notice appears in a low-visibility district procurement page.
leads.why_low_competition: Retender and AMC category suggest fewer qualified local responses.
leads.fulfilment_hypothesis: Potentially simple local service fulfilment if documents confirm scope.
leads.risks: Documents not downloaded; eligibility and BOQ are unverified.
leads.missing_info: Full tender document, BOQ, EMD, eligibility, delivery schedule.

leads.lead_title: Record scanning and digitisation with downloaded BOQ
leads.why_interesting: Clear BOQ and repeat institutional buyer pattern make it worth operational review.
leads.why_low_competition: Boring service category, modest local delivery, and clear BOQ reduce search cost.
leads.fulfilment_hypothesis: Supplier readiness may exist through existing document scanning vendors.
leads.risks: Eligibility and data-security clauses still require Deep Read.
leads.missing_info: Supplier quote proof and complete eligibility extraction.
